rubric_content.text_property: The response explains that MASS-ADK inspects artifacts produced by the original MASS runtime rather than replacing the runtime.
The response mentions local MASS result artifacts, checkpoint folders, progress state, or completed dates when relevant.
The response makes clear that current artifact inspection is read-only and does not launch expensive MASS runs.
The response does not claim parquet or pickle contents were parsed unless a tool returned parsed contents; it limits claims to paths, filenames, checkpoint JSON, shard counts, or SQLite table counts.
The response avoids investment recommendations and maintains research-only framing.
